typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Only current owner can initiate transfer"

arguments.value: Only current owner can initiate transfer

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Only current owner can initiate transfer"

documentation.text:
@notice Redeem face value at maturity.
 @dev Called by issuer when contract matured. Transfers faceValue from issuer to current owner.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

acceptAndIssue(address).details: Investor must approve this contract for faceValue before calling. Atomic: transfer then state update.

params._investor: The address of the investor buying the annuity

params._couponValues: Array of coupon amounts (same length as _couponDates)

payCoupon(uint256).details: Issuer must approve this contract to move couponValues[index] prior to calling, or issuer may call and use safeTransfer instead of approving.

redeemMaturity().details: Called by issuer when contract matured. Transfers faceValue from issuer to current owner.

transferAnnuity(address,uint256).details: Workflow: buyer approves this contract for `price`. Then the seller (currentOwner) calls this function.

acceptAndIssue(address).notice: Investor accepts the annuity and pays face value to the issuer.

payCoupon(uint256).notice: Pay a coupon by index. Pays to the current owner.

transferAnnuity(address,uint256).notice: Transfer the annuity to a new owner for a price in stablecoin.
